hero.title:
Building
Intelligent
Systems That Learn
hero.subtitle: I design and deploy production-grade machine learning systems that solve real-world problems at scale. Specializing in NLP, computer vision, and large language models with 5+ years of industry experience delivering AI solutions used by millions.

cards.title: Deep Learning
cards.description: Expertise in designing custom neural architectures for complex pattern recognition using PyTorch and TensorFlow. Experienced with transformers, graph neural networks, and diffusion models for real-world applications.

cards.title: MLOps & Production
cards.description: End-to-end ML pipeline orchestration, model serving, monitoring, and A/B testing at scale using Docker, Kubernetes, MLflow, and automated CI/CD pipelines for machine learning systems.

cards.title: LLMs & Generative AI
cards.description: Fine-tuning and deploying large language models with RAG pipelines, prompt engineering, and generative AI solutions for enterprise applications serving over 2 million users globally.

cards.title: Cloud Architecture
cards.description: Multi-cloud ML infrastructure design on AWS SageMaker, GCP Vertex AI, and Azure ML. Cost-optimized distributed training and inference at scale with auto-scaling and spot instances.

cards.title: Research & Innovation
cards.description: Published research at NeurIPS, ICML, and ICLR. Active open-source contributor with 4,000+ cumulative GitHub stars. Bridging the gap between cutting-edge research and production systems.

cards.title: Leadership & Mentoring
cards.description: Led cross-functional teams of ML engineers and researchers. Founded a local AI community with 500+ members. Mentored 10+ junior engineers through successful career transitions.

items.description: Leading the development of LLM-powered products serving over 2 million users. Designed Retrieval-Augmented Generation architecture that reduced hallucination rates by 40%. Mentoring a team of 4 ML engineers. Deployed fine-tuned Llama 3 models for enterprise document analysis and summarization.

Built a real-time fraud detection system processing 50,000+ events per second with 99.7% accuracy. Developed a custom computer vision pipeline for automated manufacturing quality inspection. Reduced model inference cost by 60% through quantization and pruning techniques.

Published 3 papers at NeurIPS and ICML on graph neural networks for molecular property prediction. Developed the open-source library MolGraph (2,000+ GitHub stars) used by researchers worldwide. Built foundational models for drug discovery applications.

Built a recommendation engine that improved user engagement by 35%. Deployed a multilingual NLP pipeline for automated customer support across 8 languages. Implemented an A/B testing framework for systematic model evaluation and deployment.

items.title: DocuMind AI
items.description: Enterprise RAG system that answers questions over 100,000+ document corpora with citation-backed responses and 95% accuracy. Features hybrid search, real-time streaming, and multi-modal document understanding.

items.title: DefectNet
items.description: Real-time manufacturing defect detection system running at 120 FPS on edge devices. Reduced false positive rates by 60% using novel attention mechanisms and knowledge distillation techniques.

items.title: MolGraph
items.description: Open-source library for molecular property prediction using graph neural networks. 2,000+ GitHub stars, adopted by 500+ researchers globally. Includes 20+ pretrained models and comprehensive documentation.

items.title: VoiceFlow
items.description: Real-time speech transcription and translation system using Whisper and custom fine-tuned models. Supports 30+ languages with 98% accuracy and sub-200ms latency for live streaming.

items.title: OptiPrice
items.description: Dynamic pricing engine using deep reinforcement learning and demand forecasting. Increased revenue by 23% for an e-commerce platform with 50,000+ products across 15 categories.

items.title: SecuraML
items.description: Adversarial machine learning security toolkit for detecting and defending against model attacks. Includes model poisoning detection, gradient masking, and adversarial training pipelines.

footer.tagline: Building the future, one model at a time.
